descriptionShort: Profile of Moncton Hawks centre Dave Tomlinson, who played junior hockey in Richmond, B.C. and is now praised as a two-way forward in the AHL.
descriptionLong: Dave Tomlinson, a 24-year-old centre for the Moncton Hawks, is profiled as one of the American Hockey League's top two-way forwards. The article discusses his development from a junior hockey player in Richmond, B.C. through Boston University to his current role as a major contributor to the Hawks. Hawks coach Rob Laird praises Tomlinson's defensive play and penalty-killing abilities while noting his offensive production of 11 goals in 12 games.

attribution.headline: Tomlinson makes smooth transition to two-way forward
